signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The most significant recent development is the **resolution of the SEC's long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, which has been confirmed as dropped[1]. This regulatory clarity represents a fundamental catalyst that has already moved XRP prediction markets substantially.
